channel.title: EDDBUD
channel.description:
Welcome and thanks for visiting my channel. My name is Eddbud and I am a non elite runner from the South West of England. You will find a host of shoe and running gear reviews along with video logs of running events here on my channel.
Subscriber count of 1000 as of 26/9/19
Subscriber count of 10,000 as of 10/2020
Subscriber count of 25,000 as of 1/2022
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8Pnc_D6UQfr1hvPtLZLvjw/join
Email me at eddbudshoetube@gmail.com
Follow me on Strava https://www.strava.com/athletes/30448518
Follow me on Instagram https://www.instagram.com/eddbud/
Buy Channel Merch at Teespring https://teespring.com/en-GB/stores/eddbudstore

item.description:
#NIKE #NIKENATURE #ALPHAFLYNATURE #PEGASUSTURBO #EDDBUD
SUSTAINABLE ETHICAL RUNNING SHOES or MARKETING TRICK? - EDDBUD
All the key manufacturers are producing more sustainable shoes these days with recycled yarns, foams and rubber. But is this all a marketing trick to get us buying the same or inferior products for more money? Are there any real benefits here or are we buying sold products that are mainly new with scrap or waste material thrown in for more money?
I try and do my bit when it comes to recycling and being more friendly to the earth, i barely use my car, walk whenever possible and use public transport. I am not bashing these attempts, but sparking some discussion and thought on the subject.
Shoes featured in todays video are...
NIKE AIR ZOOM ALPHAFLY NEXT NATURE NIKE ZOOMX PEGASUS TURBO NEXT NATURE ADIDAS ADIZERO ADIOS PRO 3
Let me know your thoughts an opinions on this one down in the comments.
Hold tight people, stay strong and we WILL make it through.
Keep it nice in the comments please, i do not do unpleasant, its just ..... unpleasant. See you in the digital ones and zeros......
Subscriber count as of 15/7/2022 29488 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Buy EDDBUD channel merchandise at the link below. https://teespring.com/en-GB/stores/eddbudstore
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Email me at: eddbudshoetube@gmail.com
Follow me on Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/30448518
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/eddbud/
Join the EDDBUD Runners United strava group at the link below. https://www.strava.com/clubs/EDDBUDRUNNERSUNITED
Please like, share, comment and subscribe. We are building a great community here, and it is down to you the viewers.
item.title: PEG TURBO & ALPHAFLY NEXT NATURE - SUSTAINABLE ETHICAL RUNNING SHOES or MARKETING TRICK? - EDDBUD
item.author: EDDBUD

item.description:
#ALPHAFLYNEXT%2 #nike #zoomx #EDDBUD #RUNNINGSHOES
FACTS & MYTHS - NIKE AIR ZOOM ALPHAFLY NEXT% V1 & V2 | EDDBUD
I was one of the very first shoe-tubers to review the NIKE AIR ZOOM ALPHAFLY NEXT% back in 2020. Now with the release of the NIKE AIR ZOOM ALPHAFLY NEXT% 2 i see lots of mediocre reviews with very little detailed information about the shoe, people quoting about supposed differences in the arch, incorrect information surrounding the AIR ZOOM pods and inexperienced and biased views about the shoes use and potential benefits to ALL RUNNERS.
Today i have for you some RESEARCHED FACTS and i go BUSTING MYTHS around these superb running shoes which can benefit ALL RUNNERS.
The study on running economy can be found here.
ah https://scientifictriathlon.com/tts322/#t-1636271627653
Let me know your thoughts and opinions down in the comments.
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8Pnc_D6UQfr1hvPtLZLvjw/join
Hold tight people, stay strong and we WILL make it through.
Keep it nice in the comments please, i do not do unpleasant, its just ..... unpleasant. See you in the digital ones and zeros......
Subscriber count as of 18/7/2022 29590
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

item.title: FACTS & MYTHS - NIKE AIR ZOOM ALPHAFLY NEXT% V1 & V2 | EDDBUD

item.description:
#ZOOMFLY5 #NIKE #ZOOMX #EDDBUD #RUNNINGSHOES
NIKE ZOOM FLY 5 VS THE REST | ADIDAS BOSTON 10, INVINCIBLE RUN FK 2, ENDORPHIN SPEED 3 & MAGIC SPEED
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8Pnc_D6UQfr1hvPtLZLvjw/join
Today another video in the VS THE REST series, a new type of comparison, one running shoe in an out and out battle against many others!
I have received loads of requests for comparisons of the NIKE ZOOM FLY 5 vs lots of other models. I shall work my way through the 2021/2022 shoes to give a real feel for how it shapes up.
Featured today are the following.
ASICS MAGIC SPEED NIKE ZOOMX INVINCIBLE RUN FK 2 ADIDAS ADIZERO BOSTON 10 SAUCONY ENDORPHIN SPEED 3
What have you made of the NIKE ZOOM FLY 5 so far? Is it an upgrade or are there too many differences for it to be an option for you?
Hold tight people, stay strong and we WILL make it through.
Keep it nice in the comments please, i do not do unpleasant, its just ..... unpleasant. See you in the digital ones and zeros......
Subscriber count as of 14/7/2022 29462 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Email me at: eddbudshoetube@gmail.com
Follow me on Strava: https://www.strava.com/athletes/30448518
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/eddbud/
Join the EDDBUD Runners United strava group at the link below. https://www.strava.com/clubs/EDDBUDRUNNERSUNITED
Please like, share, comment and subscribe. We are building a great community here, and it is down to you the viewers.

item.description:
NASICS SUPERBLAST | HOKA BONDI 8 | PUMA DEVIATE NITRO/ELITE V2 & FLOW VELOCITI ELITE | Yea or Nay? | EDDBUD
Yea or Nay is back once again!
In this series i examine new or future running shoe releases and explain as to why i might be testing them out when available.
4 new or forthcoming or new releases, will i be picking them up for review on the channel? Tune in to find out!
ASICS SUPERBLAST HOKA BONDI 8 PUMA DEVIATE NITRO/ELITE V2 UNDER ARMOUR FLOW VELOCITI ELITE
A couple of max cushion monoliths and some speedier offerings into todays video.
Loads of new and interesting shoes in todays YEA or NAY!
Let me know your list in the comments below.
Hold tight people, stay strong and we WILL make it through.
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8Pnc_D6UQfr1hvPtLZLvjw/join
Please do subscribe and also click that notification bell. Also help us out with a like and a share.
Keep it nice in the comments please, i do not do unpleasant, its just ..... unpleasant. See you in the digital ones and zeros......

item.description:
#RUNNINGNEWS #ZOOMFLY5 #NIKE #ALPHAFLY #EDDBUD
NIKE ZOOM FLY 5 RELEASE - ALPHAFLY NEXT %2 RESTOCK - Running News Ep 59
As always, interesting developments in the world of running!
Today i look at the improved range of running shoes designed specifically for women, the release of the ZOOM FLY 5 and ALPHAFLY NEXT% 2 GENERAL RELEASES, along with a new PUMA SUSTAINiBLE RANGE called FIRST MILE. In addition i discuss the new tech used in the JORDAN 37 which is set to use a double stacked zoom air strobel unit in the forefoot. Could we see that in forthcoming running shoes.
Hold tight people, stay strong and we WILL make it through.
Keep it nice in the comments please, i do not do unpleasant, its just ..... unpleasant. See you in the digital ones and zeros......

item.description:
#ASICS10K #LONDON10K #EDDBUD #RACERECAP #ASICS
ASICS LONDON 10K 2022 RACE RECAP - EDDBUD - RUNNING SHOE SELECTION and PERFORMANCE ANALYSIS
I was in the capital city of England, Central London for the ASICS LONDON 10K. Here is my race review and recap.
Find out how i got on, the shoes i wore and my thoughts on the race route.
I analyse my performance and give you some race footage to set the scene. How did the ASICS METASPEED SKY+ get on navigating me across the packed and thankfully closed road course of the ASICS LONDON 10K? Amazing to see so many viewers and meet lots of awesome runners out there in the serious sunshine. It was a hard session out there and much rest is needed after this one!
Hold tight people, stay strong and we WILL make it through.
Keep it nice in the comments please, i do not do unpleasant, its just ..... unpleasant. See you in the digital ones and zeros......
Subscriber count as of 11/7/2022 29351 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

item.description:
#ZOOMFLY5 #NIKE #ZOOMFLY #EDDBUD #RUNNINGSHOES
NIKE ZOOM FLY 5 INITIAL REVIEW - BEST CARBON PLATE TRAINER? - EDDBUD
An initial review of the recently released NIKE ZOOM FLY 5.
I shoe i have purchased this one with my own cash. No freebies here. As always honest opinions based on experience in the shoe.
The V4 was a shoe that did not hit the mark for me and i examine the ZOOM FLY 5 today to see if it fits the specification as a popular carbon plate training shoe. ZOOMX here in the midsole, but its nothing new!
My initial review saw me hitting speeds anywhere from 8:20/mi to about 6:20/mi. It is a wider and more stable shoe compared to the V4, loads of grip and perhaps now a shoe you can say is very much a training model than a race option due to increased weight.
Let me know your thoughts and opinions down in the comments.
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8Pnc_D6UQfr1hvPtLZLvjw/join
Hold tight people, stay strong and we WILL make it through.
Keep it nice in the comments please, i do not do unpleasant, its just ..... unpleasant. See you in the digital ones and zeros......
Subscriber count as of 13/7/2022 29407
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

item.description:
#SAUCONY #SPEED3 #ENDORPHINSPEED3 #EDDBUD #SPEED3REVIEW
SAUCONY ENDORPHIN SPEED 3 REVIEW | STILL THE BEST ALL ROUND RUNNING SHOE ON THE MARKET? | EDDBUD
I gave the original Saucony Endorphin Speed a 11.2/12 back in 2020, it was a wondrous, versatile and very nimble shoe. The V2 was similar but not quite the shoe we had in the V1.
How does this new version 3 stack up against the original and V2? I examine the upper, midsole and outsole along with perceived value of the shoe and give you my thoughts after 10 miles or 16km.
A wider landing platform and improved outsole mean it is good news! An Ian Botham of running shoes.
Let me know your thoughts on the shoe down in the comments section.
Hold tight people, stay strong and we WILL make it through.
Keep it nice in the comments please, i do not do unpleasant, its just ..... unpleasant. See you in the digital ones and zeros......
